index.title: Alexander Moiseev — AI Automation Engineer
index.metaDescription: Alexander Moiseev — AI Automation Engineer. Sales, support and internal process automation with Telegram, CRM, n8n and AI.
index.heroTitle: AI Automation Engineer for sales, support and operations
index.heroDesc: I automate leads, bookings, CRM, 24/7 responses and internal processes with Telegram, n8n, AI and Google Cloud
index.heroMessage: I help businesses lose fewer leads, respond faster to clients, and eliminate manual routine from processes
index.offerAgenciesDesc: White-label AI automation development for agency clients
index.offerAgenciesCta: Looking for white-label and partner projects →
index.offerSMBDesc: Automation of leads, bookings, payments, reminders and routine
index.offerSmbCta: Analyze processes and eliminate manual work →
index.offerBotsDesc: Bots that don't just respond, but guide the client through a scenario
index.offerAICRMDesc: Connecting Telegram / AI / CRM / Google / knowledge bases into a working system
index.aboutP1: Hi! I'm a developer and analyst with 29 years of experience in the IT industry. My core competencies include building chat bots, AI agents, and AI assistants. I specialize in system integrations, workflow automation, and implementing neural network solutions.
index.aboutP2: My primary tool is the n8n platform, which allows rapidly connecting different services and models via API and MCP. I use Claude Code to accelerate development — an intelligent assistant for writing and refactoring code.
index.aboutP3: Beyond development, I handle analytics, architecture design, and optimizing interactions with neural models. I always strive to find the optimal solution and pay special attention to data security. I spend a lot of time testing — I bring every project to full completion, always keeping focus on quality.
index.step1Desc: I analyze the business process, identify bottlenecks and growth points
index.step2Desc: I design the solution architecture, select tools and integrations
index.step3Desc: I implement workflows, configure API integrations and AI agents
index.step4Desc: I test scenarios, catch edge cases, and stabilize
index.step5Desc: I launch to production, monitor, and improve based on results
index.who1: Agencies that need a technical partner for clients
index.who2: Small businesses losing leads and time
index.who4: Teams that need AI + n8n + CRM + Google stack
index.who5: Those with chaotic automation that needs to be systematized
index.contactMessage: Write to me on Telegram what you want to automate — I'll propose a working implementation plan

billiard.title: Table Booking 24/7 for Billiard Club
billiard.subtitle: Telegram bot with calendar, payments and notifications

psr.problem: Billiard club administrators spent up to 60% of their work time handling phone calls for table bookings. Clients couldn't always get through during peak hours.
psr.solution: Telegram bot with automatic display of available slots, online booking, and AI answers to frequently asked questions. Full integration with Google Calendar.
psr.result: 40% reduction in admin workload, booking speed reduced to 2 minutes, 24/7 operation without human involvement.

cards.title: View schedule
cards.desc: Client sees all available slots and tables for the selected date in real time

cards.title: Choose a specific table
cards.desc: Option to select a specific table or zone in the club with a layout view

cards.title: Instant confirmation
cards.desc: Bot confirms the booking and sends a confirmation with order details

cards.title: AI answers to questions
cards.desc: Automatic answers about pricing, club rules, and available services via OpenAI

cards.title: Admin panel
cards.desc: Administrator sees up-to-date bookings without manual data entry

cards.title: Reminders
cards.desc: Automatic reminders about upcoming bookings one hour before start

psr.problem: Music service provided track-to-stem separation but the process was fully manual. Clients waited for operator responses, payments through card transfers without automation.
psr.solution: Telegram bot automatically accepts audio files, processes via API service, accepts payment through Robokassa and delivers ready stems.
psr.result: Full service automation. 24/7 payment acceptance without human involvement. Instant delivery of ready materials.

cards.desc: Ready stems sent via Telegram after processing

cards.desc: Order history and access to past works

hrNeuro.title: AI Screening of Applications & Candidate Qualification
hrNeuro.subtitle: HR Neuro-Employee for automating application processing

psr.problem: HR department spent 40+ hours per week manually processing HeadHunter applications. Thousands of monthly applications required manual review, HR managers wasted time on unqualified candidates.
psr.solution: AI bot that automatically processes applications, conducts initial qualification and maintains records in Google Sheets. Instant response to applications 24/7, scripted questions, filtering unqualified candidates.
psr.result: 8000+ applications received, 3500+ candidates automatically processed, 1166 hours saved for HR department. Hiring time reduced from 2 weeks to 3-4 days.

cards.title: Auto application processing
cards.desc: Instant response to new HeadHunter applications 24/7 without human involvement

cards.title: Candidate qualification
cards.desc: Scripted clarifying questions to determine requirement match

cards.title: Google Sheets tracking
cards.desc: Recording all answers and statuses in a unified table for HR

cards.title: Application filtering
cards.desc: Automatic identification of unqualified candidates and filtering out unsuitable ones

cards.title: HR notifications
cards.desc: Handing warmed candidates to HR manager with complete dossier

cards.title: Communication history
cards.desc: Full history of all interactions with each candidate
